title: How Goldmine Scores AI Tools Before They Go Mainstream
excerpt: Most AI tool lists are curated by humans with opinions. Goldmine uses real momentum data from 6 platforms to surface what's actually gaining traction — before the hype cycle kicks in.

title: Why ThothAI Processes Everything on Your Device
excerpt: Cloud AI is convenient until it isn't. ThothAI runs entirely on your device — no servers, no accounts, no data leaving your machine. Here's why we built it that way.

title: What Is RAG and Why It Matters for Your Documents
excerpt: Retrieval-Augmented Generation sounds complicated, but the idea is simple: instead of guessing, the AI searches your actual documents first. Here's how it works and why it's better.

title: The 6 Platforms We Monitor to Find AI Tools Early
excerpt: GitHub, Hacker News, Product Hunt, Reddit, arXiv, and Dev.to — each one tells a different story about whether an AI tool is real or just noise. Here's what we look for on each.
